summary: Iteration 22: Verified rich text editor toolbar (22 features), visual template selector (8 templates), and login page. All backend APIs passing. Frontend UI components verified via code review and Playwright testing.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/seo/global - returns SEO settings (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/referral/config - returns referral settings with enabled=true, discount_percent=20
Backend: GET /api/sitemap.xml - returns valid XML sitemap
Backend: POST /api/resume/upload - successfully processes PDF files
Backend: POST /api/resume/analyze - returns analysis with scores, strengths, weaknesses
Backend: POST /api/resume/quick-fix - returns fixed_text preview for unpaid users
Frontend: Login page (/login) shows 'Continue with Google' button prominently
Frontend: Login page has 'Sign In' and 'Sign Up' tabs
Frontend: Login form has email/password fields with submit button
Frontend: Sign Up form has name/email/password fields
Frontend: Resume Optimizer page loads at /resume-optimizer
Frontend: Upload functionality accepts PDF files and processes them
Frontend: Analysis step shows Overall Score and ATS Score rings
Frontend: Analysis shows Strengths, Weaknesses, Missing Keywords, Suggestions cards
Frontend: 5 backend template cards visible (Executive Professional, Modern Tech, ATS Maximum, Career Pivot, One-Page Compact)
Frontend: Fix My Resume button triggers AI processing and shows preview
Frontend: Paywall modal appears correctly for unpaid users
Code Review: RichEditor.jsx has 22 toolbar features (19 buttons + 3 dropdowns)
Code Review: FONT_SIZES array has 5 options (Small, Normal, Medium, Large, X-Large)
Code Review: FONT_COLORS array has 9 colors (Black, Dark Gray, Blue, Navy, Teal, Red, Amber, Green, Purple)
Code Review: HIGHLIGHT_COLORS array has 5 options (Yellow, Green, Blue, Pink, None)
Code Review: constants.js defines 8 VISUAL_TEMPLATES (classic, modern, executive, minimal, bold, elegant, corporate, creative)

visual_templates_verification.location: Step 4 results tab, below 'Your Improved Resume' heading

login_page_verification.google_signin_button: ✅ 'Continue with Google' button visible and prominent

seed_data_creation: Created test PDF at /tmp/test_resume.pdf for upload testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified: (1) RichEditor.jsx has 22 toolbar features - 19 icon buttons + 3 dropdown menus (Font Size with 5 options, Font Color with 9 colors, Highlight with 5 options). (2) VISUAL_TEMPLATES in constants.js has 8 templates with unique accent colors. (3) Login page at /login has Google Sign In button and email/password tabs. Note: Rich text editor and visual templates are only accessible after payment - verification done via code review.
